name: North & South
description:
North & South is a turn-based strategy game set during the American Civil War. The game presents a lighthearted and cartoonish representation of the conflict, focusing on strategic troop deployment and battlefield tactics. Players control either the Union or Confederate armies across a map of the United States, aiming to capture key territories and ultimately control the country. 

The game is divided into two main phases: a strategic map phase and a tactical battle phase.

**Strategic Map Phase:** This phase involves moving armies across the map, occupying states, and managing resources. Each territory produces resources that can be used to reinforce armies and build fortifications. The goal is to capture enemy territories and control strategic locations like forts and railroads.

**Tactical Battle Phase:** When armies clash on the strategic map, the game transitions to a real-time tactical battle. Players command their troops on a side-scrolling battlefield. The battlefield consists of varied terrain, including hills, rivers, and forts. Each side has infantry, cavalry, and artillery units. Victory is achieved by routing the enemy army or capturing their flag. Battles can be affected by weather conditions such as rain, which slows movement, or by ambushes by bandits who attack both sides indiscriminately. There are also train robbery events for each side.

The game features multiple scenarios, each representing a different period of the war, with varying starting conditions and objectives. The overall objective is to control the majority of the United States territory by capturing enemy states, defending controlled territories, and managing resources effectively.

controls.arrow_up: Move selected army upwards on the strategic map / Scroll battlefield view upwards in tactical battles
controls.arrow_down: Move selected army downwards on the strategic map / Scroll battlefield view downwards in tactical battles
controls.arrow_left: Move selected army leftwards on the strategic map / Move selected unit to the left in tactical battles
controls.arrow_right: Move selected army rightwards on the strategic map / Move selected unit to the right in tactical battles
controls.space: Select army on strategic map / Fire selected unit's weapon in tactical battles
controls.w: Select infantry unit in tactical battles
controls.a: Select artillery unit in tactical battles
controls.s: Select cavalry unit in tactical battles
controls.q: End turn on the strategic map
controls.e: Display information about selected territory on the strategic map
